calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Michael S. Rossoff, Esq., for the Plaintiff TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION.
Michael Sause sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by LEOPOLDO TORTOLERO.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited, void and of no effect.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 55 mASON sTREET, #218, San Francisco, CA 94102.
Rent and Per Diem Damages $332.88
Attorney's Fees $120.00
Costs $ waived.
for a Total Judgment of $452.88
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: L. Fong, Matter Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances on THUR-JAN-12-2015:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development is represented by Michael Hann;
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant Leopoldo Tortolero. The trial date of January 12, 2015 remains on calendar. (501)
